mapper.sql: kb.id, kb.base_code, kb.base_name, kb.domain_type, kb.description, kb.status, kb.owner_user_id, kb.update_time, COALESCE(doc.doc_count, 0) AS document_count, COALESCE(chunk.chunk_count, 0) AS chunk_count

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT base_id, COUNT(1) AS doc_count FROM ai_knowledge_document WHERE is_deleted = FALSE GROUP BY base_id ) doc ON doc.base_id = kb.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT base_id, COUNT(1) AS chunk_count FROM ai_knowledge_chunk GROUP BY base_id ) chunk ON chunk.base_id = kb.id

sql.if: AND ( kb.base_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keywords}, '%') OR kb.base_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keywords}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM ai_knowledge_base kb
WHERE kb.is_deleted = FALSE
ORDER BY kb.update_time DESC, kb.id DESC

SELECT DISTINCT FROM ai_knowledge_base kb INNER JOIN ai_user_knowledge_permission perm ON perm.base_id = kb.id AND perm.user_id = #{userId} AND perm.status = 1 AND perm.can_view = TRUE
WHERE kb.is_deleted = FALSE
ORDER BY kb.update_time DESC, kb.id DESC

SELECT id, base_code, base_name, domain_type, description, status, owner_user_id, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, is_deleted FROM ai_knowledge_base WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT id, base_code, base_name, domain_type, description, status, owner_user_id, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, is_deleted FROM ai_knowledge_base WHERE base_code = #{baseCode} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_knowledge_base SET base_code = #{baseCode}, base_name = #{baseName}, domain_type = #{domainType}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
